title: PhysicalLayout
description: The RECORD of the schedule-staged packing chosen at a lowering stage (RFC-0001 §4.1/§4.3; DN-01 Resolved; RFC-0004 §5). Physical layout is NOT in the type and is NOT the decision locus — it is an inspectable record (FR-M5, NFR-4). Invariant M-I5: `physical` is always a lossless encoding of `payload`; changing it MUST NOT change the value's type or its guarantee.

x-mycelium.$comment: M-I5 (losslessness) relates `physical` to `payload`; it is a cross-value-field invariant verified by code (Phase-1 M-101/M-112), not within this schema.

PackScheme.description: RFC-0001 §4.3: an EXTENSIBLE registry. The fixed small set (~5 schemes) keeps schedule selection tractable (T1.4). I2S/TL1/TL2 are the bitnet.cpp packings (DN-01).
